# Stop Think Pivot

> Don't Let Life Push You Around. Stop. Think. Pivot.

A personal site and blog by Matt. Covers mindset, faith, business, and the discipline of intentional direction — stopping to think before reacting, and pivoting with purpose rather than panic.

## Site Structure

- / — Home, recent posts
- /blog — Full post archive
- /about — About the author and the site
- /rss.xml — RSS feed

## Content

Posts are written in plain Markdown and cover:
- Mindset and intentional living
- Faith-adjacent topics
- Business and personal pivots
- Hard-won lessons shared directly

## Contact

Site: https://stopthinkpivot.com
